panels.title: Latest Full Sweep
panels.description: When the last full-band sweep (88-470 MHz) completed

targets.rawSql: SELECT toUnixTimestamp64Milli(max(timestamp)) AS last_sweep FROM spectrum.sweep_health WHERE preset = 'full'

panels.title: Freq Bins
panels.description: Number of frequency bins in the latest full sweep (expected: 3917)

targets.rawSql: SELECT bin_count AS bins FROM spectrum.sweep_health WHERE preset = 'full' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Sweeps Today
panels.description: Total completed sweeps since midnight (full + airband)

targets.rawSql: SELECT uniq(sweep_id) AS sweeps FROM spectrum.sweep_health WHERE timestamp > today()

panels.title: Clipped Full Sweeps (24h)
panels.description: Full sweeps where any bin exceeded -3 dBFS. At the roof antenna position, Military VHF (146-152 MHz) and DVB-T (180-198 MHz) both clip at gain=20. Reduce gain to 12 dB to eliminate.

targets.rawSql: SELECT countIf(max_power > -3) AS clipped FROM spectrum.sweep_health WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND preset = 'full'

panels.title: Sweep Duration
panels.description: Full sweep execution time with sparkline — expected ~2250ms

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS time, sweep_duration_ms AS value FROM spectrum.sweep_health WHERE preset = 'full' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY time

panels.title: RF Waterfall
panels.description: Spectrogram: frequency (Y) vs time (X), color = max power per 5 MHz band per 5-minute interval. Dark = noise floor, bright = active signal.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AS time, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=85) AS `85`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=90) AS `90`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=95) AS `95`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=100) AS `100`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=105) AS `105`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=110) AS `110`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=115) AS `115`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=120) AS `120`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=125) AS `125`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=130) AS `130`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=135) AS `135`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=140) AS `140`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=145) AS `145`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=150) AS `150`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=410) AS `410`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=415) AS `415`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=420) AS `420`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=425) AS `425`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=430) AS `430`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=435) AS `435`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=440) AS `440`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=445) AS `445`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=450) AS `450`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=455) AS `455`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=460) AS `460`, maxIf(power_dbfs, intDiv(freq_hz,5000000)*5=465) AS `465` FROM spectrum.scans WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND sweep_id LIKE 'full:%' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Current Power Spectrum
panels.description: Power vs frequency from the latest full sweep (88-470 MHz). Color shows signal strength: blue = noise floor, red = strong signal.

targets.rawSql: SELECT concat(toString(round(freq_hz / 1000000.0, 1)), ' MHz') AS freq, power_dbfs FROM spectrum.scans WHERE sweep_id = (SELECT sweep_id FROM spectrum.sweep_health WHERE preset = 'full' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1) ORDER BY freq_hz

panels.title: Band Occupancy
panels.description: Percentage of bins above noise floor (+6 dB) per band in the latest full sweep. Noise floor = UHF Q25 (~-51 dBFS).

targets.rawSql: WITH latest AS (SELECT sweep_id FROM spectrum.sweep_health WHERE preset = 'full' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1), noise AS (SELECT quantile(0.25)(power_dbfs) AS nf FROM spectrum.scans WHERE sweep_id = (SELECT sweep_id FROM latest) AND freq_hz BETWEEN 400000000 AND 470000000) SELECT CASE WHEN freq_hz BETWEEN 88000000 AND 108000000 THEN 'FM' WHEN freq_hz BETWEEN 108000000 AND 137000000 THEN 'Air' WHEN freq_hz BETWEEN 137000000 AND 174000000 THEN 'VHF' WHEN freq_hz BETWEEN 174000000 AND 230000000 THEN 'DVB-T' WHEN freq_hz BETWEEN 230000000 AND 380000000 THEN 'Mid' WHEN freq_hz BETWEEN 380000000 AND 470000000 THEN 'UHF' END AS band, round(countIf(power_dbfs > (SELECT nf FROM noise) + 6) * 100.0 / count(), 1) AS occupancy_pct FROM spectrum.scans WHERE sweep_id = (SELECT sweep_id FROM latest) GROUP BY band HAVING band IS NOT NULL ORDER BY band

panels.title: Active Known Frequencies
panels.description: All known Athens-area signals detected in the latest full sweep with their current power levels

targets.rawSql: SELECT kf.name, kf.category, round(kf.freq_hz / 1000000.0, 3) AS freq_mhz, kf.modulation, round(s.power_dbfs, 1) AS power_dbfs FROM spectrum.known_frequencies kf CROSS JOIN (SELECT freq_hz, power_dbfs FROM spectrum.scans WHERE sweep_id = (SELECT sweep_id FROM spectrum.sweep_health WHERE preset = 'full' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1)) s WHERE abs(toInt64(s.freq_hz) - toInt64(kf.freq_hz)) <= toInt64(greatest(kf.bandwidth_hz / 2, 50000)) ORDER BY power_dbfs DESC

panels.title: VHF/Marine Signal Power
panels.description: Power at VHF infrastructure and marine frequencies over time (full sweeps). Military, business radio, marine channels, and AIS.

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.timestamp AS time, s.power_dbfs AS value, kf.name AS metric FROM spectrum.scans s CROSS JOIN spectrum.known_frequencies kf WHERE abs(toInt64(s.freq_hz) - toInt64(kf.freq_hz)) <= toInt64(greatest(kf.bandwidth_hz / 2, 50000)) AND $__timeFilter(s.timestamp) AND kf.category IN ('gov', 'business', 'marine') AND s.sweep_id LIKE 'full:%' ORDER BY time

panels.title: Strongest Unknown Signals
panels.description: Strong signals (> -35 dBFS) not matching any entry in the known_frequencies table, grouped by 1 MHz. These are candidates for identification.

targets.rawSql: WITH latest AS (SELECT sweep_id FROM spectrum.sweep_health WHERE preset = 'full' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1), matched_freqs AS (SELECT DISTINCT s.freq_hz FROM spectrum.scans s CROSS JOIN spectrum.known_frequencies kf WHERE s.sweep_id = (SELECT sweep_id FROM latest) AND abs(toInt64(s.freq_hz) - toInt64(kf.freq_hz)) <= toInt64(greatest(kf.bandwidth_hz / 2, 50000))) SELECT round(freq_hz / 1000000) AS freq_mhz, round(max(power_dbfs), 1) AS peak_power, count() AS bins FROM spectrum.scans s WHERE s.sweep_id = (SELECT sweep_id FROM latest) AND s.power_dbfs > -35 AND s.freq_hz NOT IN (SELECT freq_hz FROM matched_freqs) GROUP BY freq_mhz ORDER BY peak_power DESC LIMIT 15

panels.title: Airband Activity
panels.description: Power at Athens ATC frequencies from fast 60s airband sweeps (118-137 MHz, 60s resolution).

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.timestamp AS time, s.power_dbfs AS value, kf.name AS metric FROM spectrum.scans s CROSS JOIN spectrum.known_frequencies kf WHERE abs(toInt64(s.freq_hz) - toInt64(kf.freq_hz)) <= toInt64(greatest(kf.bandwidth_hz / 2, 50000)) AND $__timeFilter(s.timestamp) AND kf.category = 'airband' AND s.sweep_id LIKE 'airband:%' ORDER BY time

panels.title: Marine Activity
panels.description: Power at marine VHF frequencies over time (Ch16, Ch13, AIS, coast stations). Data from full sweeps only (~5 min resolution).

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.timestamp AS time, s.power_dbfs AS value, kf.name AS metric FROM spectrum.scans s CROSS JOIN spectrum.known_frequencies kf WHERE abs(toInt64(s.freq_hz) - toInt64(kf.freq_hz)) <= toInt64(greatest(kf.bandwidth_hz / 2, 50000)) AND $__timeFilter(s.timestamp) AND kf.category = 'marine' AND s.sweep_id LIKE 'full:%' ORDER BY time

panels.title: Detected Peaks
panels.description: Spectral peaks from the latest full sweep — bins significantly above their neighbors (prominence > 10 dB)

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(p.freq_hz / 1000000.0, 2) AS freq_mhz, round(p.power_dbfs, 1) AS power, round(p.prominence_db, 1) AS prominence_db FROM spectrum.peaks p WHERE p.sweep_id = (SELECT sweep_id FROM spectrum.peaks WHERE sweep_id LIKE 'full:%' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1) ORDER BY p.prominence_db DESC LIMIT 25

panels.title: Signal Events
panels.description: Signals that appeared or disappeared between consecutive full sweeps (delta > 15 dB)

targets.rawSql: SELECT e.timestamp, e.event_type, round(e.freq_hz / 1000000.0, 2) AS freq_mhz, round(e.power_dbfs, 1) AS power, round(e.prev_power, 1) AS prev_power, round(e.delta_db, 1) AS delta_db FROM spectrum.events e ORDER BY e.timestamp DESC LIMIT 30

panels.title: Z-Score Anomalies
panels.description: Frequencies with unusual power relative to their rolling 20-sweep average. |z| > 3 is statistically unusual. Baseline adapts over ~20 sweeps (~100 min) after antenna/gain changes — expect bulk anomalies during transition.

targets.rawSql: WITH recent AS (SELECT freq_hz, power_dbfs, timestamp, sweep_id, avg(power_dbfs) OVER (PARTITION BY freq_hz ORDER BY timestamp ROWS BETWEEN 20 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS mean_20, stddevPop(power_dbfs) OVER (PARTITION BY freq_hz ORDER BY timestamp ROWS BETWEEN 20 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS std_20 FROM spectrum.scans WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 2 HOUR AND sweep_id LIKE 'full:%') SELECT timestamp, round(freq_hz / 1000000, 2) AS freq_mhz, round(power_dbfs, 1) AS power, round(mean_20, 1) AS baseline, round(std_20, 1) AS std_dev, round((power_dbfs - mean_20) / if(std_20 < 0.5, 0.5, std_20), 1) AS z_score, if((power_dbfs - mean_20) > 0, 'stronger', 'weaker') AS direction FROM recent WHERE sweep_id = (SELECT sweep_id FROM spectrum.scans WHERE sweep_id LIKE 'full:%' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1) AND abs((power_dbfs - mean_20) / if(std_20 < 0.5, 0.5, std_20)) > 3 ORDER BY abs((power_dbfs - mean_20) / if(std_20 < 0.5, 0.5, std_20)) DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Current Run Config
panels.description: Scanner configuration for the current run — antenna position, gain, measured noise floor and peak. Each scanner restart creates a new run.

targets.rawSql: SELECT run_id, started_at, gain_db, antenna_position, antenna_arms_cm, antenna_height_m, round(noise_floor_dbfs, 1) AS noise_floor, round(peak_signal_dbfs, 1) AS peak_signal, round(peak_signal_freq_hz / 1000000.0, 2) AS peak_freq_mhz, notes FROM spectrum.scan_runs ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 3

panels.title: Signal Persistence Classification
panels.description: Every detected frequency classified by how often it appears above noise floor (+6 dB) over the last 72 hours. always_on = infrastructure/broadcast, frequent = repeaters, intermittent = voice dispatch, rare = transient events.

targets.rawSql: WITH signal_presence AS (SELECT round(freq_hz / 100000) * 100000 AS freq_bin, sweep_id, max(power_dbfs) AS power, max(power_dbfs) > -44.8 AS is_present FROM spectrum.scans WHERE sweep_id LIKE 'full:%' AND timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 72 HOUR GROUP BY freq_bin, sweep_id) SELECT freq_bin / 1000000 AS freq_mhz, countIf(is_present) AS present, count() AS total_sweeps, round(countIf(is_present) * 100.0 / count(), 1) AS presence_pct, round(avgIf(power, is_present), 1) AS avg_power, multiIf(countIf(is_present) * 100.0 / count() > 95, 'always_on', countIf(is_present) * 100.0 / count() > 50, 'frequent', countIf(is_present) * 100.0 / count() > 10, 'intermittent', 'rare') AS class FROM signal_presence GROUP BY freq_bin HAVING countIf(is_present) > 0 ORDER BY class, presence_pct DESC LIMIT 80

panels.title: Burst Event Summary
panels.description: Frequencies with the most transient events (appeared/disappeared >15 dB between consecutive sweeps) in the last 72 hours. High counts = bursty/intermittent signals like voice comms or radar.

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(freq_hz / 1000000.0, 2) AS freq_mhz, event_type, count() AS events, round(avg(delta_db), 1) AS avg_delta_db, round(max(delta_db), 1) AS max_delta_db, max(timestamp) AS last_event FROM spectrum.events WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 72 HOUR GROUP BY freq_hz, event_type ORDER BY events DESC LIMIT 30

panels.title: 24-Hour Activity Pattern
panels.description: Average signal power by hour of day for key signal groups. Shows diurnal patterns — ATC peaks during flight operations, marine follows shipping schedules. Based on last 72 hours of full sweeps.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toString(toHour(timestamp)) AS hour, round(avgIf(power_dbfs, freq_hz BETWEEN 118000000 AND 137000000), 1) AS Airband, round(avgIf(power_dbfs, freq_hz BETWEEN 146000000 AND 153000000), 1) AS Military_VHF, round(avgIf(power_dbfs, freq_hz BETWEEN 156000000 AND 163000000), 1) AS Marine_VHF, round(avgIf(power_dbfs, freq_hz BETWEEN 164000000 AND 170000000), 1) AS Unknown_165_169 FROM spectrum.scans WHERE sweep_id LIKE 'full:%' AND timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 72 HOUR GROUP BY hour ORDER BY toUInt8(hour)
